speaker: KING
text: So shaken as we are, so wan with care,

speaker: KING
text: Find we a time for frighted peace to pant

speaker: KING
text: And breathe short-winded accents of new broils

speaker: KING
text: To be commenced in strands afar remote.

speaker: KING
text: No more the thirsty entrance of this soil

speaker: KING
text: Shall daub her lips with her own children’s blood.

speaker: KING
text: No more shall trenching war channel her fields,

speaker: KING
text: Nor bruise her flow’rets with the armèd hoofs

speaker: KING
text: Of hostile paces. Those opposèd eyes,

speaker: KING
text: Which, like the meteors of a troubled heaven,

speaker: KING
text: All of one nature, of one substance bred,

speaker: KING
text: Did lately meet in the intestine shock

speaker: KING
text: And furious close of civil butchery,

speaker: KING
text: Shall now, in mutual well-beseeming ranks,

speaker: KING
text: March all one way and be no more opposed

speaker: KING
text: Against acquaintance, kindred, and allies.

speaker: KING
text: The edge of war, like an ill-sheathèd knife,

speaker: KING
text: No more shall cut his master. Therefore, friends,

speaker: KING
text: As far as to the sepulcher of Christ—

speaker: KING
text: Whose soldier now, under whose blessèd cross

speaker: KING
text: We are impressèd and engaged to fight—

speaker: KING
text: Forthwith a power of English shall we levy,

speaker: KING
text: Whose arms were molded in their mothers’ womb

speaker: KING
text: To chase these pagans in those holy fields

speaker: KING
text: Over whose acres walked those blessèd feet

speaker: KING
text: Which fourteen hundred years ago were nailed

speaker: KING
text: For our advantage on the bitter cross.

speaker: KING
text: But this our purpose now is twelve month old,

speaker: KING
text: And bootless ’tis to tell you we will go.

speaker: KING
text: Therefor we meet not now. Then let me hear

speaker: KING
text: Of you, my gentle cousin Westmoreland,

speaker: KING
text: What yesternight our council did decree

speaker: KING
text: In forwarding this dear expedience.

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: My liege, this haste was hot in question,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: And many limits of the charge set down

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: But yesternight, when all athwart there came

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: A post from Wales loaden with heavy news,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Whose worst was that the noble Mortimer,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Leading the men of Herefordshire to fight

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Against the irregular and wild Glendower,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Was by the rude hands of that Welshman taken,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: A thousand of his people butcherèd,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Upon whose dead corpse there was such misuse,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Such beastly shameless transformation

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: By those Welshwomen done, as may not be

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Without much shame retold or spoken of.

speaker: KING
text: It seems then that the tidings of this broil

speaker: KING
text: Brake off our business for the Holy Land.

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: This matched with other did, my gracious lord.

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: For more uneven and unwelcome news

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Came from the north, and thus it did import:

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: On Holy-rood Day the gallant Hotspur there,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Young Harry Percy, and brave Archibald,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: That ever valiant and approvèd Scot,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: At Holmedon met, where they did spend

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: A sad and bloody hour—

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: As by discharge of their artillery

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: And shape of likelihood the news was told,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: For he that brought them, in the very heat

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: And pride of their contention did take horse,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Uncertain of the issue any way.

speaker: KING
text: Here is a dear, a true-industrious friend,

speaker: KING
text: Sir Walter Blunt, new lighted from his horse,

speaker: KING
text: Stained with the variation of each soil

speaker: KING
text: Betwixt that Holmedon and this seat of ours,

speaker: KING
text: And he hath brought us smooth and welcome news.

speaker: KING
text: The Earl of Douglas is discomfited;

speaker: KING
text: Ten thousand bold Scots, two-and-twenty knights,

speaker: KING
text: Balked in their own blood, did Sir Walter see

speaker: KING
text: On Holmedon’s plains. Of prisoners Hotspur took

speaker: KING
text: Mordake, Earl of Fife and eldest son

speaker: KING
text: To beaten Douglas, and the Earl of Atholl,

speaker: KING
text: Of Murray, Angus, and Menteith.

speaker: KING
text: And is not this an honorable spoil?

speaker: KING
text: A gallant prize? Ha, cousin, is it not?

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: In faith, it is a conquest for a prince to boast of.

speaker: KING
text: Yea, there thou mak’st me sad, and mak’st me sin

speaker: KING
text: In envy that my Lord Northumberland

speaker: KING
text: Should be the father to so blest a son,

speaker: KING
text: A son who is the theme of Honor’s tongue,

speaker: KING
text: Amongst a grove the very straightest plant,

speaker: KING
text: Who is sweet Fortune’s minion and her pride;

speaker: KING
text: Whilst I, by looking on the praise of him,

speaker: KING
text: See riot and dishonor stain the brow

speaker: KING
text: Of my young Harry. O, that it could be proved

speaker: KING
text: That some night-tripping fairy had exchanged

speaker: KING
text: In cradle-clothes our children where they lay,

speaker: KING
text: And called mine “Percy,” his “Plantagenet”!

speaker: KING
text: Then would I have his Harry, and he mine.

speaker: KING
text: But let him from my thoughts. What think you, coz,

speaker: KING
text: Of this young Percy’s pride? The prisoners

speaker: KING
text: Which he in this adventure hath surprised

speaker: KING
text: To his own use he keeps, and sends me word

speaker: KING
text: I shall have none but Mordake, Earl of Fife.

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: This is his uncle’s teaching. This is Worcester,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Malevolent to you in all aspects,

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: Which makes him prune himself, and bristle up

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: The crest of youth against your dignity.

speaker: KING
text: But I have sent for him to answer this.

speaker: KING
text: And for this cause awhile we must neglect

speaker: KING
text: Our holy purpose to Jerusalem.

speaker: KING
text: Cousin, on Wednesday next our council we

speaker: KING
text: Will hold at Windsor. So inform the lords.

speaker: KING
text: But come yourself with speed to us again,

speaker: KING
text: For more is to be said and to be done

speaker: KING
text: Than out of anger can be utterèd.

speaker: WESTMORELAND
text: I will, my liege.
